result.stdout:
Description:
  Updates the NuGet version info of SDK style projects that are configured to create a NuGet package.

Usage:
  Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.NuGetPreBuildApplyBranchOrTag [options]

Options:
  --nugetResultFolder <nugetResultFolder>  The folder where the created NuGet package should be saved []
  --tag <tag>                              The tag (defining a release version)
  --branch <branch> (REQUIRED)             The name of the branch of the repository
  --build <build> (REQUIRED)               The build number
  --workspace <workspace> (REQUIRED)       The workspace path
  --solution-filepath <solution-filepath>  The filepath to the solution.
  --version                                Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                           Show help and usage information
